calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jessie Sellem in Propria Persona.
Arthur De Assis Ribeiro in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it often gets these petitions, but does not grant them, noted that the parties have an official record on file with France showing that they are officially married, and stated that these petitions are for those situations where no record exist. Ms. Sellem stated that they thought it would be a good idea because she is a student, that she will be here for one year, that her Husband has permission to be here for six months and that they are going to Immigration to ask for an additional six months. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
